excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in New Media lists Final round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-01-19. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline Priority round: 8 December 2025 Final round: 19 January 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Early applications are strongly encouraged.
